title: clusia parvula
intro: Clusia parvula, also known as the 'small clusia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clusia parvula include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Clusia parvula is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
